# Heta Shah

MS in Business Analytics @ UC Irvine  
Data Analyst | Machine Learning | NLP

---

## About Me

I’m a data-driven analyst with a background in computer science and business analytics. I specialize in machine learning, NLP, and data visualization to drive actionable insights and support decision-making.

---

## Experience

### Student Business Analyst – Cotality
- Built an NLP-based model to analyze sales engineering conversations
- Integrated Salesforce and Gong data for performance insights
- Delivered recommendations to improve win rates and sales velocity

### Business Analyst Intern – AiVantage.Global
- Conducted A/B testing and improved campaign performance
- Built dashboards for stakeholder decision-making
- Identified product improvements through data analysis

---

## Projects

### Song Popularity Prediction
- NLP + ML model using Spotify + lyrical data
- Engineered sentiment and structural features

### Diabetes Risk Prediction
- Ensemble ML model with SMOTE and feature engineering
- Improved recall and prediction accuracy

---

## Skills

**Languages:** Python, R, SQL  
**Tools:** Tableau, Power BI, Excel  
**Platforms:** Databricks, Snowflake, SAS  

---

## Contact

Email: hetaskz@gmail.com  
GitHub: https://github.com/hetashah34  
LinkedIn: (add your link)
